_documentation.purpose: Frozen 'known good' state of the Intel org chart, captured 2026-05-01 after the full-fleet pipeline ran. Used by test_snapshot_diff.py to detect unexpected drift.
_documentation.rebaseline_protocol: If a deliberate change to the inference algorithm causes drift, re-capture this file using the same query as conftest's capture script and update _documentation.captured_at + _documentation.captured_after. Then bump the tolerance bands in test_snapshot_diff.py if necessary.
_documentation.captured_after: Step A re-run (full-fleet pipeline post Step B backfill); 1,065 clusters / 7,094 edges total across all tenants.
_documentation.tolerance_policy: Asserted as ranges, not exact equality. Intel's chart will drift slightly each pipeline run as new persons/employment_periods are added. The test enforces floor-and-ceiling bands documented in test_snapshot_diff.py.
